summary.market: AMZN: Stock down 13% YTD amid investor unease over high AI capital expenditure ($200B projected for 2026), despite strong Q4 2025 sales growth (14% increase to $213.4B). AWS continues AI expansion. INTC: Mixed performance; rallied 8% recently after Core Ultra Series 3 launch, but faces 'Reduce/Sell' consensus ratings due to flat Q1 guidance and ongoing foundry challenges.
